summary: Tested La Neuron STEAM Academy backend enquiry API (8/8 pytest cases pass) and the React landing page UI (hero, navbar, scroll-to-form CTA, STEAM interactive tabs S/T/E/A/M, FAQ accordion 0-7, register form happy + empty-submit flows, mobile menu). All critical flows work end-to-end including the form submission persisting to /api/enquiries and showing the success state + success toast.

issues: Frontend label/input restricts child_age to 6-13 (HTML min=6/max=13) while backend Pydantic allows 4-16 (ge=4, le=16). Not user-facing but a spec inconsistency — recommend tightening backend to ge=6 le=13 (the marketed age range) or relaxing UI to match backend.

action_items: (Optional) Align child_age validation between backend (4-16) and frontend (6-13). Per business description (ages 6-13), tightening backend to ge=6 le=13 is preferred.
(Optional) Brand text 'La Neuron' in the navbar is not exposed as a discoverable child of <nav> via simple text-locator (still visible). Not a bug — no fix required.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py — _send_owner_email references `logger` before it is defined (logger is initialised on line 162, after the function is declared on line 89). Currently harmless because Resend branch is gated by RESEND_API_KEY env var which is unset, but will raise NameError once Resend is configured. Move logger init to top of file.
server.py — Uses deprecated @app.on_event('shutdown'); migrate to FastAPI lifespan context manager.
Register.jsx — child_age input min=6/max=13 while backend permits 4-16; either source of truth should drive both.
Code is clean, modular, sectional components, proper data-testid coverage on all required interactive elements, MongoDB _id correctly excluded via projection.
test_credentials: N/A — no auth on this app
seed_data_creation: Created 3 TEST_-prefixed enquiry records in mongo `enquiries` collection during testing (parent_name starts with 'TEST_'). Safe to leave or purge.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/test_enquiries.py covers /api/enquiries POST (success + 422 cases: age low, age high, invalid email, missing required) and GET (list + persistence verification). Run with: pytest /app/backend/tests/test_enquiries.py -v --junitxml=/app/test_reports/pytest/pytest_results.xml. UI flows verified via Playwright: data-testid selectors are well-populated. Radix Select dropdowns need ~400ms wait after open before clicking the first [role='option']. Empty-submit error toast text: 'Please fill in all required fields.' Success toast text: 'Enquiry received! We will respond within 24 hours.' RESEND_API_KEY is intentionally unset → email_sent:false is the correct, expected response (per problem statement).
